title: Define the requirement | CanadaBuys

breadcrumbs.title: Importance of a clear procurement requirement
Completing the Security Requirements Check List
Security in standing offers and supply arrangements
Compliance with the Canadian electrical code

structure_blocks.heading: Define the requirement
structure_blocks.text: This section provides information on the essential aspects of defining procurement requirements from requisition receipt to quality assurance and socioeconomic requirements. Defining procurement requirements is a crucial step in the procurement process, as it lays the foundation for successful outcomes.
